hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx) if command -v npx >/dev/null && [[ -f package.json ]]; then npx --no-install prettier --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; npx --no-install eslint "$f" 2>&1 || true; fi ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
